dhp21-32:1.0.21: Appamādo amatapadaṁ,pamādo maccuno padaṁ;Appamattā na mīyanti,ye pamattā yathā matā.
dhp21-32:1.0.22: Evaṁ visesato ñatvā,appamādamhi paṇḍitā;Appamāde pamodanti,ariyānaṁ gocare ratā.
dhp21-32:1.0.23: Te jhāyino sātatikā,niccaṁ daḷhaparakkamā;Phusanti dhīrā nibbānaṁ,yogakkhemaṁ anuttaraṁ.
dhp21-32:1.0.25: Uṭṭhānenappamādena,saṁyamena damena ca;Dīpaṁ kayirātha medhāvī,yaṁ ogho nābhikīrati.
dhp21-32:1.0.26: Pamādamanuyuñjanti,bālā dummedhino janā;Appamādañca medhāvī,dhanaṁ seṭṭhaṁva rakkhati.
dhp21-32:1.0.27: Mā pamādamanuyuñjetha,mā kāmaratisanthavaṁ;Appamatto hi jhāyanto,pappoti vipulaṁ sukhaṁ.
dhp21-32:1.0.28: Pamādaṁ appamādena,yadā nudati paṇḍito;Paññāpāsādamāruyha,asoko sokiniṁ pajaṁ;Pabbataṭṭhova bhūmaṭṭhe,dhīro bāle avekkhati.
dhp21-32:1.0.29: Appamatto pamattesu,suttesu bahujāgaro;Abalassaṁva sīghasso,hitvā yāti sumedhaso.
dhp21-32:1.0.30: Appamādena maghavā,devānaṁ seṭṭhataṁ gato;Appamādaṁ pasaṁsanti,pamādo garahito sadā.
dhp21-32:1.0.31: Appamādarato bhikkhu,pamāde bhayadassi vā;Saṁyojanaṁ aṇuṁ thūlaṁ,ḍahaṁ aggīva gacchati.
dhp21-32:1.0.32: Appamādarato bhikkhu,pamāde bhayadassi vā;Abhabbo parihānāya,nibbānasseva santike.
